summary: Completed Market Mechanics Visualization Layer testing. Backend API fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend has critical JavaScript errors preventing Market Mechanics rendering.

ui_bugs.issue: Cannot find module 'lightweight-charts' error in _setMarkers method
ui_bugs.error_details: Failed to set markers: Error: Cannot find module 'lightweight-charts' - appears to be module import issue

ui_bugs.issue: Multiple 'Failed to remove series: Error: Value is undefined' errors in clear() method
ui_bugs.error_details: Series cleanup failing due to undefined values in renderedSeries array

ui_bugs.issue: Runtime errors preventing chart interactions - webpack overlay blocking clicks
ui_bugs.selector: button clicks intercepted by error overlay
ui_bugs.error_details: Error overlay iframe blocking all user interactions with timeframe buttons and search

integration_issues.issue: MarketMechanicsRenderer failing to render POI zones, liquidity lines, and CHOCH markers
integration_issues.root_cause: Module import issues and series management errors

passed_tests: Backend /api/ta/setup/v2 returns poi, liquidity, choch_validation, displacement with correct structure
POI zones returned with proper type (demand/supply), price_high, price_low, mitigated fields
Liquidity pools with EQH/EQL sides, touches, strength values
Sweep markers with BSL/SSL types, direction, pool_price
CHOCH validation with VALID/WEAK/FAKE labels and proper scoring (0.79 = VALID)
Maximum POI zones constraint respected (1 active zone ≤ 3 limit)
All Market Mechanics components present: 5 POI zones, 5 liquidity pools, 5 sweeps, valid CHOCH, 16 displacement events
Manual validation matches expected results perfectly
Frontend loads successfully and navigates to Tech Analysis page
Chart infrastructure present (52 chart elements detected)
Market terms 'poi' and 'choch' found in page content
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical JavaScript errors in MarketMechanicsLayer.js: 1) Resolve 'lightweight-charts' module import issue in _setMarkers method (likely incorrect require() usage), 2) Fix undefined values in renderedSeries array causing series removal errors, 3) Ensure proper cleanup of chart series and price lines to prevent overlay blocking interactions
success_percentage: backend: 100%, frontend integration: 30% (data flows but rendering fails)
